title: Plazma's Chess
description: This is just a normal chess mod. Now you can play chess in minecraft.
body: A Minecraft mod that introduces chess brings a strategic twist to the game, allowing players to enjoy classic board battles within the Minecraft world. This mod adds a fully functional chessboard where players can engage in multiplayer matches or practice against AI. The chess pieces are beautifully rendered to match Minecraft’s blocky aesthetic, and each piece moves according to standard chess rules. This unique addition provides a fun, cerebral challenge amidst the usual survival and building elements of Minecraft.
